protocol.title: Bosch IVT Protocol. HTTP is local. XMPP is cloud!

abort.faulty_credentials: Bad user credentials or wrong IP

init.title: Bosch options
init.description: Configure energy data source and other options.

data.new_stats_api: Write energy data to HA statistics (required for Energy Dashboard). Note: Ignored when POINTT is enabled - POINTT always writes hourly statistics.
data.optimistic_mode: Use optimistic mode for some functions (currently Easycontrol Operation mode set).
data.experimental_pointt_api: [EXPERIMENTAL] Use POINTT cloud API for HOURLY energy data (like the Bosch app). Completely replaces local energy readings with real hourly data.

pointt_credentials.title: POINTT API Authentication
pointt_credentials.description: Choose authentication method. First run: pip install uv && uv run --with playwright python -m playwright install chromium

pointt_callback.title: POINTT Callback URL
pointt_callback.description: Run ./scripts/run_playwright_ha.sh and log in with your SingleKey-ID. Copy the callback URL and paste it here.

pointt_tokens.title: POINTT Direct Tokens
pointt_tokens.description: Enter access and refresh tokens. Run ./scripts/run_playwright.sh to get both tokens.

error.pointt_auth_failed: POINTT authentication failed. Check your credentials.
